mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video WHERE status IN
#{status}
SELECT id, file_name, file_size, format, duration_seconds, file_path, status, created_at, updated_at FROM video ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video (id, file_name, file_size, format, duration_seconds, file_path, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{format, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{duration, javaType=long, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{filePath}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE video SET file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, format = #{format, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, duration_seconds = #{duration, javaType=long, jdbcType=BIGINT}, file_path = #{filePath}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}
